title: Glide
description: Gracefully glide around your world with a paraglider inspired by Legend of Zelda: Breath Of The Wild / Tears Of The Kingdom
body:
# WELCOME TO GLIDE!
Glide adds in a brand new mode of transportation for your exploration needs: **THE GLIDER!**

Heavily inspired in both function and looks by ***Legend of Zelda: Breath Of The Wild/Tears Of The Kingdom***, the glider allows you to soar through the skies as a early/mid-game more of air transport.

When equipped in the hand trinket slot, you open up your glider with **[Space]** midair.

![A Player using the Glider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0qoVWgC/images/52580ef9922baa05ba4d8de62f60833d68c0d119.png)

## Heat Sources
You can glide over heat sources (such as campfires, fire, lava etc.) to launch up and either start your glide or give your glide new height!

![A Player using a campfire to launch into the air](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0qoVWgC/images/c2c350540cecd251c19e1df521f6a2bb9a626f20.gif)

## Enchantments
Glide adds two new enchantments for your glider: Gust and Cyclone!

Gust will push you forward and give you a boost of speed and Cyclone will launch you up into the air like a heat source but with even more lift.

<details>
<summary>Enchantment Warning v.1.0.0-v.1.0.1 </summary>

These versions have the names swapped by accident (whoops!) so for those versions, Gust will launch you up and Cyclone will push you forward!

</details>

![The Gust enchant being used to cross a ravine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0qoVWgC/images/8aacd524e3ea1cba9d143b1fcfd78f2511e09f88.gif)
![The Cyclone enchant being used to avoid falling into water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P0qoVWgC/images/26514d60d41996a8e5a96ba0f88e52be9393cd0c.gif)

## Notes

Requires [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [**Trinkets**](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) to work!

<details>
<summary>Planned Features</summary>

- Customisable Glider Fabrics and Frames
- Emissive Textures for some Glider designs
- Particle effects for using the enchantments
- Terminal Velocity cap (that can be negated with Slow Fall)
- Balancing using in the Nether through a temperature system
- Enchantment Balancing

</details>

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

Code by [AmyMialee](https://modrinth.com/user/AmyMialee)

Art by [SillviaTV](https://modrinth.com/user/SillviaTV)

Mods/Shaders used in Screenshots:

[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)

[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)

[Complimentary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)

</details>
